subject: fix(pwa): restore brand color for status bar theme-color
body:
The dark mode implementation replaced the branded status bar color
(#10b981) with generic page background colors (#f9fafb/#14142a).
This causes visibility problems when the OS color scheme differs
from the app theme — light text on light bg or dark text on dark bg.

The status bar is a branding surface, not a content surface. A
mid-tone brand color provides enough contrast for status bar text
(time, battery, wifi) in both light and dark OS modes.

Tags: pwa, theme, ux, fix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
